title: Ammonia Ocean
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''[[Ammonia/Legends|Ammonia]] Ocean''' was an area of [[Thrantin]]. Although the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] did not have such an area as a natural scape, it was artificially created by planet owner [[Barosa Warren]]. Warren spent decades planetscaping the world to create a controlled environment for his [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]].

{{Loc-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
